description: Account fragment in Arabic with figures expressed in eastern Arabic numerals. Based on the paleography the dating may be estimated as 16th- early 19th-century. The labeling of the accounts is in a disorderly hand yet, for example, on the verso the financial term "الباقي / the remainder" is visible. One notable distinction in the numerical system in use is that on the recto the Persianate symbol for "4 / ۴" appears. MCD.
